# procd module
> **Total Context:** ~352 tokens

- [header_api-procd-api.md](../L2-semantic/procd/header_api-procd-api.md) (352 tokens) - Defines the procd init script Bash API for service registration and supervised process lifecycle control. Exposes procd_open_service(), procd_close_service(), procd_open_instance(), procd_close_instance(), and procd_set_param() for declaring supervised processes with respawn rules, environment variables, limits, file triggers, and bound network devices. Also provides procd_add_reload_trigger() for UCI-based reload events.
